results.title: Skills · OpenClaw
results.description: Skill Workshop writes only to <workspace>/skills, scans generated content, supports pending approval or automatic safe writes, quarantines unsafe proposals, and refreshes the skill snapshot after successful writes so new skills become available without a Gateway restart. Use it for corrections such as "next time, verify GIF attribution" or hard-won workflows such as media QA checklists. Start with pending approval; use automatic writes only in trusted workspaces after reviewing its proposals. Full guide: Skill Workshop plugin. ClawHub is the public skills registry for OpenClaw.

results.title: Agent Skills Marketplace | Claude, Codex & ChatGPT Skills · LobeHub
results.description: Credits: Original skill by @blader - https://github.com/blader/humanizer ... Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via a background process. Use when: (1) building or creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in a temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that requires file exploration.
